testcase.name: test_admin_content_contains_all_contact_keys

failure.message: AssertionError: contact group missing. Got groups: ['general'] assert 'contact' in {'general': [{'key': 'brand.name', 'value': 'Once Were Wild', 'type': 'text', 'label': 'brand.name'}, {'key': 'brand.sub', 'value': 'Travel', 'type': 'text', 'label': 'brand.sub'}, {'key': 'brand.tagline', 'value': 'Rediscover the woman who was always wild at heart.', 'type': 'text', 'label': 'brand.tagline'}, {'key': 'contact.directions.label', 'value': 'Get Directions', 'type': 'text', 'label': 'contact.directions.label'}, {'key': 'contact.errors.email', 'value': 'Please enter a valid email address.', 'type': 'text', 'label': 'contact.errors.email'}, {'key': 'contact.errors.first_name', 'value': 'Please tell us your first name.', 'type': 'text', 'label': 'contact.errors.first_name'}, ...]}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_contact_admin.py:76: in test_admin_content_contains_all_contact_keys assert "contact" in groups, f"contact group missing. Got groups: {list(groups.keys())}" E AssertionError: contact group missing. Got groups: ['general'] E assert 'contact' in {'general': [{'key': 'brand.name', 'value': 'Once Were Wild', 'type': 'text', 'label': 'brand.name'}, {'key': 'brand.sub', 'value': 'Travel', 'type': 'text', 'label': 'brand.sub'}, {'key': 'brand.tagline', 'value': 'Rediscover the woman who was always wild at heart.', 'type': 'text', 'label': 'brand.tagline'}, {'key': 'contact.directions.label', 'value': 'Get Directions', 'type': 'text', 'label': 'contact.directions.label'}, {'key': 'contact.errors.email', 'value': 'Please enter a valid email address.', 'type': 'text', 'label': 'contact.errors.email'}, {'key': 'contact.errors.first_name', 'value': 'Please tell us your first name.', 'type': 'text', 'label': 'contact.errors.first_name'}, ...]}
